title: Ghostty is leaving GitHub
author: WadeGrimridge
aiHeadline: After years of dedicated service, Ghostty, a beloved GitHub developer, has decided to part ways with the platform, leaving the community in shock and mourning the loss of a true coding legend.

title: Your phone is about to stop being yours
author: doener
aiHeadline: Your smartphone, once your loyal companion, is about to become a spying device controlled by corporations, making you wonder if you ever truly owned it in the first place.

title: Localsend: An open-source cross-platform alternative to AirDrop
author: bilsbie
aiHeadline: Tired of AirDrop's constant failures? Localsend is here to save the day with its open-source, cross-platform file-sharing solution, offering a reliable alternative that feels like a breath of fresh air.

title: UAE to leave OPEC
author: bazzmt
aiHeadline: The UAE is making a bold move by leaving OPEC, signaling a shift towards renewable energy and independence from oil dependency, leaving the world to ponder the future of global energy strategies.

title: GTFOBins
author: StefanBatory
aiHeadline: GTFOBins is the ultimate Swiss Army knife for hackers, providing a treasure trove of tools to exploit systems, making it an indispensable resource for cybersecurity enthusiasts and mischief-makers alike.
